title: Amplitude Amplification
description: Quantum Amplitude Amplification (QAA) algorithm is used to amplify the probability amplitude of target components in a quantum state.

params.help: The initial probability p to amplify (0 <= p <= 1). We will construct a rotation gate to prepare the initial state with this success rate.
params.name: p
params.info: 请输入浮点数，范围在0到1之间（如 0.1）

params.help: The number of repetitions for the amplitude amplification process.
params.name: reps
params.info: 请输入正整数，范围在1到10之间（如 2）
